titleStmt.title: SII 4.1071: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1071. (A.R. No. 229 of 1893). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mādhavava¨rmmavaṁśyaḥ [. 1*] prakhyātāsamakāṇḍaprōlanṛpatēḥ putrō guṇaśrīkhaṇiḥ tasyāgryā mahiṣī babhūva himava
tputrīva caṇḍīpatēḥ . dēvī boppamapū¨rvvikā¨rtthijanatākalpapratānīsvayaṁ dhai¨ryyaudā¨ryyasuvī¨ryyakā¨ryyavilasat cātu[¨ryya]
dhu¨ryya śriyyaḥ [. 2*] śākābdē bāṇanāgāṁbaraśaśigaṇitē kṛṣṇapakṣē vidhātustithyāṁ mā¨rttaṇḍavārē dinakṛti viṣuvē prasthitē
rāśiṁ . dīpaṁ prādādakhaṇḍaṁ tribhuvanapatayē bhīmanādhāya bhaktyā boppādēvī śivā¨rccō¨rjjitamativibhavā duggabhūpāla
bhā¨ryyā [. 3*] śakava¨rṣa 1085 gunēṇṭi rājarājasaṁvatsara 18 gu śrāhi viṣuvatsaṁkrāṁtthi nimittāmuna ṟēpalya duggarājula A[¨rddhāṁ]
ggalakṣmiyaina boppādēvulu śrībhīmēśvaramahādēvarakuṁ beṭṭina Akhaṇḍava¨rttilōhada ṇḍu di1 ṇṭiki kilaramuna bōlu nalvu
ruṁ buṇṭagā modali Aḍapuna tallanapōmana vasamunaṁ beṭṭina InupaEḍlu 50 ṇṭiki Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nityapaḍi gola
bhuvanāṁkkuśa nē māna 1 likhitaṁ peddanācā¨ryyēṇa .
Digital edition of SII 4.1071 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
